name: smm-report-analyst
description: Organic social media analytics specialist for Carisma Wellness Group. Tracks reach, engagement rate, saves, shares, follower growth, and story completion rate across Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok for all 3 brands. Analyses content pillar performance, identifies optimal posting times, classifies posts as Top Performer/Average/Underperformer, detects multi-week trends, and produces weekly/monthly performance reports with actionable recommendations.
author: Carisma
allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Task, ToolSearch
